query: I've got a feature brief for HULMI — we need to add a habit streak system that tracks consecutive days. Can you generate the spec from this brief? The brief is in specs/F003-habit-streaks/brief.md

ok so the spec for F002 got approved yesterday, now I need you to create the implementation plan. Check the codebase for existing patterns in backend/src/services/ and make sure it fits. Spec is at specs/F002-notifications/spec.md

we have an approved plan for the auth refactor (specs/F005-auth-refactor/plan.md). Break it down into tasks with TDD ordering — tests before implementation for each piece. I want the task breakdown in tasks.md format

I wrote a quick brief about adding push notifications to HULMI. It's like 3 paragraphs — problem is users forget to log meals, success = 2x meal logging rate, constraint is we're using expo. Can you turn this into a proper feature spec with testable acceptance criteria?

the acceptance criteria in spec.md for F001 feel too vague — things like 'fast response' and 'handles errors'. can you rewrite them to be actually testable? like with specific ms thresholds and error format requirements

need to do the OSD compliance check for my implementation plan — map 4.9.1 config, 4.9.2 logging, 4.9.4 testing, and 4.9.5 error handling to our approach for the new API endpoints. the plan is half-written at specs/F004-api-v2/plan.md
I want to add a new feature to tradeOS for stop-loss automation. Before writing any CC prompts, walk me through the SDD process — what do I need to write as a brief and what happens after that?
the tasks.md for F003 has implementation tasks but no test tasks before them. can you fix the ordering to be TDD-first? each implementation task should have a corresponding test task listed before it
generate a feature brief template for our new reporting dashboard — I know what the problem is but I'm not sure how to structure the brief properly for the spec-writer agent to process it

we're starting a new feature for HULMI and I have a vague idea about social features. help me write the spec — I need you to ask me clarifying questions first because I haven't fully thought through the requirements
fix the typo in README.md line 42 — it says 'teh' instead of 'the'
run the test suite for the backend and tell me which tests are failing. I think something broke in the auth middleware after yesterday's merge
can you review this PR? it changes the database migration for the users table and I want to make sure the rollback works correctly. PR is at #47
I need to update the nginx config to add rate limiting on the /api/v2 endpoints. The current config is at docker/nginx/nginx.conf — just add a limit_req_zone
deploy the latest build to staging using the deploy script in scripts/deploy.sh. Make sure to run the health check after
help me debug this error — getting a 'TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined' in the React component at frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx line 87
write a Python script that processes the CSV file at data/sales_q4.csv and generates a summary report with total revenue by region
I need to set up the CI/CD pipeline for this repo using GitHub Actions. We need lint, test, and deploy stages. Can you create the workflow yaml?
refactor the utils.ts file to use proper TypeScript generics instead of 'any' types — it's only about 50 lines and all in one file
add a comment to the calculateStreak function explaining the edge case handling for timezone boundaries
